name: Aruzi
notableProducers: Ludivia Luna (El Diviso, La Plata, Huila, Colombia)
description: Aruzi is a poorly characterized variety found in Huila, Colombia. Only a few samples have been genetically sequenced, and the results have been too varied to draw any definitive conclusions about its origins or classification. Further genetic testing is planned. It is a variety that researchers and roasters remain deeply interested in — the cup quality is compelling but the genetic story is still being written. SEY Coffee noted in 2025 that they are 'eagerly exploring' this variety further.
